=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (1:34-1:38) TS6133: 'Data' is declared but its value is never read.
  (no quick fixes)

[D2] (42:5-42:22) TS2345: Argument of type '<A, E>(effect: Effect<A, E, never>, options?: RunOptions | undefined) => Promise<A>' is not assignable to parameter of type '(_: Effect<{}, never, DbConnection | FileSystem>) => Promise<{}>'.
  Types of parameters 'effect' and '_' are incompatible.
    Type 'Effect<{}, never, DbConnection | FileSystem>' is not assignable to type 'Effect<{}, never, never>'.
      Type 'DbConnection | FileSystem' is not assignable to type 'never'.
        Type 'DbConnection' is not assignable to type 'never'.
  (no quick fixes)

  Fix 0: "Disable missingEffectContext for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable missingEffectContext for entire file"
